failure_reason: Broadened the summary source-reader floor from one checked-in file to dynamic source-coordinate rows for file, store, route, and stream inputs. The new multi-source band returns 65535 on Go/Rust/TypeScript as a 3-kernel only host-I/O proof: it reads a real source file slice, writes and reads a real temporary segmented cell-log-store value through cls-get, aggregates both ready source-data receipts into a summary CHOICE-RECEIPT, and keeps route plus stream as planned coordinates until native source readers exist. Existing real-source remains 8191, text-summary-learning remains 262143 four-way, and llm-feature-channel-floor remains 131071 four-way.
